lifecycle.label: Frame
lifecycle.purpose: Define the decision question, boundaries, owners, and institutional context.

lifecycle.label: Research
lifecycle.purpose: Route research, identify relevant sources, and expose evidence gaps.

lifecycle.label: Gather Evidence
lifecycle.purpose: Attach durable sources, citations, live observations, confidence, freshness, and provenance.

lifecycle.label: Model
lifecycle.purpose: Calculate, simulate, test, validate, and document technical assumptions.

lifecycle.label: Compare
lifecycle.purpose: Compare alternatives, scenarios, sensitivity, thresholds, stakeholders, and time horizons.

lifecycle.label: Challenge Assumptions
lifecycle.purpose: Review assumptions, claims, contradictions, risks, exceptions, and contested evidence.

lifecycle.label: Review
lifecycle.purpose: Coordinate reviewers, comments, change requests, conditions, conflicts, and sign-offs.

lifecycle.label: Approve
lifecycle.purpose: Record a named-human governance decision and lock the reviewed version.

lifecycle.label: Publish
lifecycle.purpose: Create governed internal, institutional, or public decision publications.

lifecycle.label: Implement
lifecycle.purpose: Assign commitments, owners, milestones, and implementation status.

lifecycle.label: Monitor
lifecycle.purpose: Track observations, targets, milestones, risks, and actual-versus-expected results.

lifecycle.label: Reassess
lifecycle.purpose: Record reassessments, amendments, retirement, lessons, and durable Decision Registry state.

product_roles.Research Librarian: Research routing, evidence gaps, and follow-up questions.
product_roles.Knowledge Library: Durable sources, citations, quotations, collections, and reviewed publication handoffs.
product_roles.Site Intelligence: Live and comparative indicators, monitoring observations, freshness, and methodology.
product_roles.Research Lab: Experiments, notebooks, datasets, validation results, and scientific limitations.
product_roles.Workbench: Calculations, simulations, sensitivity, optimization, graphs, and technical reports.
product_roles.Decision Studio: Alternatives, governance, collaboration, approval, publication, implementation, monitoring, and reassessment.
product_roles.Platform Core: Shared identity, provenance, Evidence Ledger, Decision Registry, events, and exchange manifests.

routing_boundaries: Lifecycle assessment may recommend actions but cannot approve a decision.
Approval, amendment, suspension, retirement, publication delivery, and professional sign-off require authorized humans.
Connected product routes are structured handoffs; they do not claim external acceptance or execution.
